items.text:
⭐️EVC Talent Casting Show 2026⭐️

Die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 geht in ihre 5. Ausgabe und wir suchen außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

Ob große Showmomente, bewegende Stimmen oder spektakuläre Performances wir geben Künstlerinnen und Künstlern eine Plattform, ihr Talent vor Jury und Publikum zu präsentieren.

🎭 Wer kann sich bewerben?

Wir öffnen unsere Bühne für:

• Musikerinnen & Musiker (Solo)

• Bands & Musikprojekte

• Tänzer & Tänzerinnen (Solo, Duo oder Crew)

• Artistinnen & Artisten (Akrobatik, Show, Performance)

• Comedians & Entertainer

• Tierische Talente mit besonderen Kunststücken

✨ Dabei gilt unser Motto 2026:

„Dein Talent kennt keine Grenzen“

Bei uns zählt nicht Herkunft, Stilrichtung oder Genre sondern Leidenschaft, Mut und Ausdruck.

Jede Bewerbung wird fair gesichtet. Jeder Act bekommt die gleiche Chance.

🎬 Die Jury-Castings starten im Frühjahr und Sommer 2026.

Dort entscheidet sich, wer es in die große Show schafft.

📌 Jetzt bewerben:

https://electricvisionscleve.de/forms/talent_casting.php

📩 Optional kannst du Fotos oder Vorschau-Videos senden an: electricvisions@gmx.de

Warte nicht auf den perfekten Moment mach ihn perfekt.

Wir freuen uns auf deine oder eure Bewerbung!

#EVCTalentCasting #TalentShow2026 #Jubiläumsstaffel #DeinTalentKenntKeineGrenzen

sharedPost.text:
Some of the wonderful feedback I’ve been receiving from my adult classes! 🥰🙌 Means a lot to know that they feel supported, comfortable and encouraged in my sessions. 

Knowing that my group can leave their hang-ups at the door, get more active and experience the JOY of dance means the world!

If you’d like to find out what the classes can do for you, drop me a message! 

Monday 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3, usually £6)

Thursday 7pm - 8pm (First session FREE!! Usually £6)

#dancemore #positivefeedback #FeelGoodFitness #liverpoollife #scousescene #trysomethingnew #halfprice #FreeClass #MoveMoreFeelBetter #mentalhealthmatters #mentalhealthawareness

sharedPost.text:
🔥 MEET HASSAN/HANAN 🔥
The youngest baker in the tent… and possibly the boldest.

Playing age 17-18
Can be played as a Male or Female 
Hassan/Hanan is of Middle Eastern heritage, and we aim to cast the role authentically with a performer who reflects both the background and playing age.

A role that is fearless and full of fire. More confidence than experience, trusts their instincts over recipe books, and bakes like they’ve got something to prove. Under the cheeky swagger? A warm, heartfelt character determined to make their family proud (yes, the lucky T-shirt makes an appearance 👕✨).

Hassan/Hanan is the heart and soul of the younger bakers — comic, passionate, impulsive, and genuinely moving when it matters most.

🎭 Pre-audition workshops this Thursday – come along, meet the team, and get a feel for the show before audition day. 

📍The Temperance Institue, 65 London Street, Southport, PR9 0TH

Tickets on sale NOW! 🎟️

☎️ 07927 331 977 (Mon - Sat 10am to 7pm) with no fees!
 
💻 Alternatively you can book* 24/7 at www.ticketsource.co.uk/Southport-Spotlights *Booking fees apply

items.text:
Szukam osoby, która pomoże mi rozwijać długoterminowy projekt związany z produkcją serii filmów na YouTube.

Projekt nie startuje od zera – istnieje już społeczność zbudowana na innych kanałach, z której będziemy kierować ruch na YouTube. Jest wizja, pomysł oraz strategia rozwoju. Potrzebuję osoby, która pomoże przełożyć to na konkretne działania i będzie współtworzyć projekt od strony organizacyjnej i produkcyjnej.

Twoja rola:
 • wsparcie w realizacji i rozwoju projektu YouTube
 • pomoc w organizacji produkcji materiałów wideo
 • koordynacja działań związanych z publikacją i rozwojem kanału
 • współpraca przy rozwijaniu nowych pomysłów i formatów
 • pomoc w budowaniu długoterminowej strategii projektu

Kogo szukam:
 • osoby samodzielnej i zaangażowanej
 • kogoś, kto potrafi działać projektowo i dowozić zadania

 • osoby, która chce współtworzyć coś większego i rozwijać projekt w długim terminie

items.summary:
Szukam osoby, która pomoże mi rozwijać długoterminowy projekt związany z produkcją serii filmów na YouTube.

Projekt nie startuje od zera – istnieje już społeczność zbudowana na innych kanałach, z której będziemy kierować ruch na YouTube. Jest wizja, pomysł oraz strategia rozwoju. Potrzebuję osoby, która pomoże przełożyć to na konkretne działania i będzie współtworzyć projekt od strony organizacyjnej i produkcyjnej.

Twoja rola:
 • wsparcie w realizacji i rozwoju projektu YouTube
 • pomoc w organizacji produkcji materiałów wideo
 • koordynacja działań związanych z publikacją i rozwojem kanału
 • współpraca przy rozwijaniu nowych pomysłów i formatów
 • pomoc w budowaniu długoterminowej strategii projektu

items.text:
Casting call brief:
## looking for a truly diverse mix of walk-on supporting artists with some professional acting experience. Typical extra roles will include business colleagues and service staff. We would be expecting two smart outfit changes per person.

Shoot Dates - 31st March 2026 or 1st April 2026

Location - London

Compensation -

£275 per person, inclusive of all costs and buyout.

£75 Fitting day (if required) 

Casting Deadline - 12th March 2026, 5pm

Usage:

Worldwide, in perpetuity, across client-owned channels including websites, presentations, events, PR, organic social media and reasonable paid social promotion via the client’s own channels. Excludes broadcast, cinema, out-of-home and third-party advertising campaign.

Synopsis:

A cinematic film capturing the exciting development of a new professional business hub based abroad. Using green screen studio filming to capture actors exploring high spec CGI projected environments
## 
# **Submission Guidelines**

Please submit the following materials to [Olly@riverfilm.com](mailto:Olly@riverfilm.com) :

* Subject Line: RAK - Supporting Artist Call Out - [Your Name]
* Required Materials:
* Current Headshot and Full Body Photo (No selfies or filtered images, professional quality preferred)
* CV, clearly listing training and experience.
* Link to Showreel or relevant self-tape/performance clips if available (Vimeo or YouTube links preferred).
* Please confirm your availability during the Shoot Dates listed above.
* Agent/Management contact information (if applicable).

Note: We appreciate your interest and thank you for your submission. Due to the high volume of submissions, only those shortlisted will be contacted.

items.title: Casting call brief:

items.text:
** **

**04 Mini serial wojenny 1940 historyczny z elementami Fantazy**

** **

**Elke Meier ( zastępca Ahnenerbe SS  ) kobieta**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’**poszukuje kobiety do roli zastępczyni szefa ekspedycji . Najlepiej jakby kandydatka miała **od 25 – 30 lat** o szczupłej budowie ciała i wzroście 170/175** włosy koloru blond bez żadnych tatuaży na twarzy czy rękach oraz farbowanych włosach czy nawet długich przedłużanych paznokciach. **Prosimy też o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć. Wszystkie kwestie będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu projektu. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej.  

Przed zdjęciami głównymi, planujemy też wykonać sesje testowe i przymiarowe dla poszczególnych aktorów i aktorek. W czasie trwania castingu na tą osobę podeślemy fragment tekstu po niemiecku do nauki aby sprawdzić czy dana osoba na pasuje do tej roli.  Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.  Przedstawione powyżej materiały są z naszych sesji testowych. Kobieta będzie nosić czarny niemiecki mundur podobny jak na zdjęciu.

 

**Elke Meier **– członek grupy okultystycznej Ahnenerbe. Zastępczyni, prawa ręka szefa jednostki poszukiwaczy skarbów Peter’a Koch’a w tej organizacji. Zimna a zarazem piękna kobieta dla której mężczyźni tracą głowę. Dla wyższych celów jest wstanie poświęcić wszystko i wszystkich.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of military uniform and text

CASTING CALL - Pieces (Short Film, Cambridge/London)
**CASTING CALL – Pieces (Short Film, Cambridge)**

In contemporary London, two young men fall deeply in love, but only one of them is allowed to exist openly. *Pieces* is a very raw, intimate short film about a gay boy and his closeted lover. Their relationship survives only in fragments, secrecy, and silence.

Location: Cambridge/London

Shooting Dates: TBD

Paid/Voluntary: Voluntary, Passion Project

Role

Umar: (Playing Age 20 - 28) - Arab, North African or South Asian heritage

Character Notes: Umar is a closeted boy, struggling with religious guilt and family pressure to live a life that is not his own. MORE INFO IN PHOTOS

Things to know:

Actors should be comfortable with intense emotional and mildly intimate scenes. (Crying, Shouting, Kissing)

Able to work in a collaborative environment

How to Apply:

Please send the following to *piecesshortfilm@outlook.com* :

Headshot

CV / acting experience

Self Tape or Showreel (Self Tape material https://linktr.ee/piecesshortfilm)

Any additional relevant info

Underneath this polished exterior, Hei sa deeply troubled. Plagued by intense religious guilt, struggles daily with accepting himself and feelings for Malachi. Umar is closeted, masculine and "straight passing Apply Now *This role requires intimacy (kissing) with another male, Malachi. Also has one smoking scene can done with nicotine free alțernatives PiecesShortFilim@outlook.com SWIPE FOR MORE DETAILS'

items.text:
Hi! This is Watersprite, largest student film festival in the world, returning 6-8th March to Cambridge, UK!

We think you might be interested into the following event, which is FREE:

Join us for a special in-conversation event with Ben Bailey Smith as he unpacks the pivotal moments that have defined his career. From early ambitions and big breaks to the reality of working on set, this discussion offers an inside look at the craft and challenges of a life on screen.

Ben Bailey Smith, also known as Doc Brown has starred in the likes of 4'O Clock Club, Disney’s Star Wars: Andor, Black Mirror and BBC’s The Sixth Commandment, written for TV Film Radio and Advertising, and has published six children’s books.

Get your tickets here:
https://watersprite.org.uk/events/how-to-be-an-actor-with-ben-bailey-smith-doc-brown

Hi! This is Watersprite, largest student film festival in the world, returning 6-8th March to Cambridge, UK!

We think you might be interested into the following event, which is FREE:

Join us for a special in-conversation event with Ben Bailey Smith as he unpacks the pivotal moments that have defined his career. From early ambitions and big breaks to the reality of working on set, this discussion offers an inside look at the craft and challenges of a life on screen.

Ben Bailey Smith, also known as Doc Brown has starred in the likes of 4'O Clock Club, Disney’s Star Wars: Andor, Black Mirror and BBC’s The Sixth Commandment, written for TV Film Radio and Advertising, and has published six children’s books.

Get your tickets here:
https://watersprite.org.uk/events/how-to-be-an-actor-with-ben-bailey-smith-doc-brown

And would it be possible to reshare the post in your stories please? Thank you x

**[PAID] 1st AC / Focus Puller Needed (Cantonese + English) — Indie Short Film (Toronto)**

Hi everyone! We’re looking for an experienced **1st AC / Focus Puller** for an **independent short film** shooting in **Toronto, ON (GTA)**.

**Shoot Dates:** **March 20–23, 2026** (one or multiple days within this window)
**Location:** **Toronto, Ontario (GTA)**
**Camera Systems:** **Sony FX6** and **ARRI Alexa Mini** (familiarity required)

**Requirements:**
* Proven experience as a **focus puller / 1st AC** on narrative/indie projects
* Comfortable with **FX6 + Alexa Mini** workflows and lens setups
* **Bilingual: Cantonese + English** (must)
* Reliable, professional, and able to work in a small, fast-moving crew

If interested, please email your **resume/credits**, **rate**, and any relevant links/reel to: **zoeyfilm77@gmail.com**
Thank you!

items.text:
Hello everyone,

I am currently casting for my next short film.

Short Film | 10–12 mins | Kitchen Sink Realism / Comedy-Drama

West Midlands | Please email jake.jakej@outlook.com if interested in any of the characters or just want to know more. 

Logline

On the final night of their beloved council estate pub, a tight-knit group of regulars refuse to let the council shut it quietly, turning a wake into a siege, and a farewell into one last, defiant karaoke anthem.

Synopsis

The Marlborough Arms is the heart of a West Midlands council estate. The place where weddings are toasted, funerals are mourned, and arguments are settled over cheap lager.

When two council bailiffs arrive early to lock up the pub for good, landlord Dave and his loyal regulars are forced to confront what the closure really means. As old resentments flare and the reality sets in that the building has already been sold to developers, the group fractures — then rallies.

Ensemble cast

Characters

Dave

Male | 45–55 | West Midlands/ North English accent

Malc

Male | 58–70 | West Midlands / Black Country accent

Sharon

Female | 40–50 | Strong Midlands accent

Kel

Female | 28–38 | Midlands accent

Tyler

Male | 20–26 | Midlands accent

Council Bailiff 1

Male | 35–55 | Neutral accent

Council Bailiff 2

Any gender | 25–50 | Neutral accent

Production Location: Stoke-On-Trent       Shoot dates 23rd 24th and 25th of March.

Voluntary only however expenses, including travel and food will be covered. Also, you will receive an IMDB credit upon the film's completion.

items.text:
NYT OPSLAG

Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (til DR) søges 

Få ledige mandlige statistroller i alder 25-50 år til statistrolle som funktionær til en fest i en togvogn Mariager-Handest, MEN med kostume/sminke dag i Skovlunde på Sjælland d. onsdag d. 4/3 et aftalt tidsrum ml. 9.30 - 15.30 (pause 11.30-13.15)

Der er kun en plads tirsdag eftermiddag og en torsdag formiddag ledig.

Se krav nederst fra Sminke og Kostume pga. perioden 1950-60erne samt tilgængelige kostumer på lager fra den periode.
Du skal ramme indenfor skiven ;-) 

FRA JYLLAND (ELLER FYN):
Produktionen dækker transport til kostume/sminkeprøven på en af disse måder
1. Bro og benzin fra bopæl til Skovlunde og retur. Alternativt en lavpris færgeovergang t/r tilsvarende prisen for broafgift.
2. En lavpris bus- eller togbillet. Der kører offentlige bus fra Skovlunde st. til adressen i Mileparken.
Der er gratis anvist parkering hos Filmgear Mileparken.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport på optagelsesdagene dækkes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger dækkes ikke.
Derudover er der et personligt honorar for kostume/sminkedagen samt et tilpasset antal optagedage. Se nedenfor

Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdagene
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 til en fest i Handest. 

Der er i alt til hver 2400 kr. honorar for 2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. Det er inkl. transporttiden.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte/bukser på eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, hårlængde min. ca. 8 cm så der kan laves sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg, du skal kunne se uden briller.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.

Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Oplys hvad du forventer af pris for transport til/fra Skovlunde på kostume/sminkedagen.

items.title: NYT OPSLAG

items.text:
skuespillere søges
Hej, vi er en gruppe unge fra filmskolen, Station Next, der er i gang med at producere en kortfilm, og vi søger derfor en dreng og en pige i alderen 15–19 år til frivillige skuespillerroller.

 

Vi leder efter nogen, der har lyst til at tage opgaven seriøst og engagere sig i projektet. Det er en fordel, hvis du har erfaring med skuespil, men det er ikke et krav, det vigtigste er, at du har mod på at prøve og lyst til at være med.

Optagelserne forventes at finde sted i Odder i weekenden den 28.–29. marts.

Hvis det lyder som noget for dig, eller en du kender, så send meget gerne en kort video til min mail, hvor du fortæller lidt om dig selv, f.eks. om du har erfaring med skuespil, og hvad du laver i din fritid.

Du kan kontakte mig her:

Mail: livalinneberg14@gmail.com

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬
items.groupTitle: jylland / gratis casting for skuespillere og statister NY
items.summary:
skuespillere søges
Hej, vi er en gruppe unge fra filmskolen, Station Next, der er i gang med at producere en kortfilm, og vi søger derfor en dreng og en pige i alderen 15–19 år til frivillige skuespillerroller.

 

Vi leder efter nogen, der har lyst til at tage opgaven seriøst og engagere sig i projektet. Det er en fordel, hvis du har erfaring med skuespil, men det er ikke et krav, det vigtigste er, at du har mod på at prøve og lyst til at være med.

Optagelserne forventes at finde sted i Odder i weekenden den 28.–29. marts.

Hvis det lyder som noget for dig, eller en du kender, så send meget gerne en kort video til min mail, hvor du fortæller lidt om dig selv, f.eks. om du har erfaring med skuespil, og hvad du laver i din fritid.

Du kan kontakte mig her:

Mail: livalinneberg14@gmail.com

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

Ikke mere morgenstivhed, og min mave føles fantastisk!

items.text:
Sam – Male Lead
Sam is a white/light-skinned man in his mid-20s to early-30s, Quietly intense. The kind of man who doesn’t speak unless he has something worth saying.

He is sweet, loving, kind, protective his main motivation is being with his family and protecting them. ACTOR MUST BE BASED IN OHIO

Physically, Sam should appear athletic or naturally solid. not bodybuilder ripped, but strong in a believable way. Think former high school athlete who still works with his hands or stays active. A slight dad-bod edge is completely fine. He should feel capable.

Appearance-wise:

 • Scruffy or slightly rugged is ideal.

 • Facial hair preferred (short beard/stubble).

 • Manly, natural look — not polished or overly groomed

items.text:
AKTOR (40-60l.) POSZUKIWANY
Witam!! Do etiudy operatorskiej Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy aktora do roli ojca.

Film utrzymany w stylistyce cyberpunkowej. Opowiada historię ojca, który samotnie wychowuje swojego syna, w międzyczasie prowadząc poszukiwania jego matki.

● Zarost mile widziany

● Szukamy oryginalnych twarzy

● W miarę wysportowana sylwetka również na plus (jednak nie typ kulturysty! zdrowa sylwetka)

🕰 Termin: 18-20.03.2026

🌐 Miejsce: Łódź i okolice

items.text:
STATYŚCI, JELENIA GÓRA
Dzień dobry,
Na warsztaty Szkoły Filmowej w Łodzi, pod opieką Jana Jakuba Kolskiego oraz Grzegorza Jaroszuka, poszukujemy statystów w różnym wieku do scen w kościele i taborze.

Scena w kościele (czwartek) – wygłodzeni mieszkańcy wioski, w przypływie desperacji, zjadają łapczywie chleb.
Scena w taborze (piątek) – pokazanie taboru romskiego, wypełnienie drugiego planu.

Zdjęcia odbywają się w czwartek i piątek, 05–06.03, w godzinach 10:00–17:00. Zapewniamy transport na  lokacje z Jeleniej Góry oraz ciepły posiłek. 

Z uwagi na niekomercyjny charakter nagrań udział w nich jest nieodpłatny, jednak daje możliwość zdobycia cennego doświadczenia i pracy w twórczym środowisku:) 

Zainteresowanych proszę o kontakt mailowy: w.blawat@student.filmschool.lodz.pl lub w wiadomości prywatnej

items.text:
Casting Call - "CHECKMATE" - Ravensbourne University - DIRECTING MODULE - SHORT FILM
My name is Timothy Pena, a 2nd year student, and I am currently looking for 2 male actors for a short film, adapting from the Interrogation scene of The Dark Knight (2008). The actors should be ages 20 and up. If interested or know anyone who might be please let me know. My group and I are planning to film between the 16th-17th March.

ABOUT THE FILM 

Adapting a scene of The Dark Knight (2008) along with chess, Checkmate explores the psychological mind between a villain and a hero, and how justice is seen in the eyes of society, as a cruel joke or something sinister in its roots. 

ROLES

Meme: The antagonist (30). A psychological freak show with a bloody mouth when smiling and dons a mafia outfit who has the habits of being the mastermind in every crime scene. Often has a hobby with chess. His goal is to bring chaos to society in order to see just how humanity will fall from their sin.

Twilight: The protagonist (30), whose ideals in delivering justice to society is questioned by their interrogator. Wears a dark hood to conceal his name and identity. His goal is to find out Meme’s plans but question if his method is the right way, or if there is more than meets the eye.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION 

* Confirmation of Availability before 11th March 
* Rooms to be confirmed but were shooting at Ravensbourne University London
* Email: penat005.205@gmail.com and subject line "CHECKMATE SUBMISSION"
* Headshot and Showreel (if possible)

Thank You!

I'm looking forward to hearing back from You.
items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

Over a year pushing the boundaries of what live comedy can be.

Over a year pushing the boundaries of what live comedy can be.
items.title: Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍

On the occasion of 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻’𝘀 𝗗𝗮𝘆,
​
we are offering a 𝗱𝗲𝗱𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝗱𝘆𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘄𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻 — a reminder that strength and softness can coexist, and that the body deserves to be listened to, not overridden.
​
𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗴𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗪𝗼𝗺𝗲𝗻
120 minutes of focused abdominal and nervous system work.
Includes an initial anamnesis.
​
🌿 𝗔𝗽𝗽𝗼𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀: https://www.bodymindtherapy.de/en/integrative-bodywork-fur-frauen-in-berlin
.
.
.

Hallo zusammen,

**Schauspieler sucht Kurzfilm- / Studentenfilmprojekte im Raum Augsburg/München und vergleichbar**

ich bin Schauspieler aus dem Raum Augsburg/München und auf der Suche nach ernsthaften
Kurzfilm-, Studenten- oder Abschlussfilmproduktionen mit künstlerischem Anspruch.
Interesse besteht vor allem an

**Hauptrollen oder tragenden Nebenrollen** 

in Projekten mit Festivalziel oder professionellem Produktionsniveau. Theatererfahrung vorhanden, zuverlässig bei Proben und Dreharbeiten. Ein Showreel ist im Aufbau, Material kann auf Anfrage gesendet werden. Auch oﬀen für 

**Zusammenarbeit mit Regie- oder Produktionsteams an eigenen oder neuen Kurzfilmprojekten**.

Herzliche Grüße,
Thorin Kiel

immer und immer wieder quält mich die Frage 
wo sind denn all die Jahre 
wo sind sie hin?

items.text:
STOP venligst med at koge kartofler i vand! Da min bedstemor hørte, at jeg koger kartofler i vand for at lave kartoffelmos, grinede hun bogstaveligt talt af mig. Hun delte den hemmelige ingrediens til at lave den bedste kartoffelmos nogensinde. Brug denne ingrediens i stedet – jeg lægger opskriften nedenunder. .
Jeg må udtrykke noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter.... Tak. Fuld opskrift

Suche immer noch eine Sängerin (gerne auch Amateurin) für meine Songs. Ich biete die Stücke, die Musik und die Aufnahme. Um sich regelmäßig treffen zu können, wäre eine räumliche Nähe zu Großhansdorf schon gut. Wäre schön von dir zu hören. 
Wäre hilfreich, wenn ihr die Anzeige teilen würdet. LG Werner

items.text:
Have a story but no stage? Or a voice but no script? 🤝
Our SoloStage Festival is doing things differently. We are offering a Creative Matchmaking

service! Apply with your talent or your "work in progress," and we will help pair writers,

directors, and performers together to build something unique for June.

Solo theatre doesn't have to be a lonely journey. Let's build your show together.

👇 Tag an artist who needs to see this! www.ettc.pl/SoloStage

Masz historię, ale brakuje Ci sceny? A może masz głos, ale nie masz tekstu? 

​Nasz SoloStage Festival robi rzeczy inaczej! Oferujemy usługę Creative Matchmaking (Kreatywne Swatanie). Zgłoś swój talent lub projekt w fazie budowy („work in progress”), a my pomożemy połączyć pisarzy, reżyserów i wykonawców, aby wspólnie stworzyć coś wyjątkowego na czerwiec.

​Teatr solo wcale nie musi być samotną drogą. Zbudujmy Twój spektakl razem!

​👇 Oznacz artystę, który musi to zobaczyć!

🔗 www.ettc.pl/SoloStage

​

#TheatreLife #Playwriting #ActingOpportunities #CreativeMatchmaker #TeatrKrakow #Sztuka #Rezyser #Aktor #PisanieSztuk #WspolpracaArtystyczna #ETTC #KrakowEvents

items.text:
KATOWICE - AKTORZY - EPIZODYŚCI POSZUKIWANI
Poszukujemy do prostych scen fabularyzowanych, w filmie dokumentalnym o tematyce religijnej, osób, które wcieliłyby się w role członków wielopokoleniowej, polskiej rodziny.
1. Małżeństwo w wieku ok. 35 lat (mężczyzna, najlepiej aktor)
2. "Dziadkowie" (Pan i Pani) - 60-70 lat
3. Dziewczynka w wieku ok. 10 lat
4. Chłopczyk ok.14 lat
5. Niemowlę - max do 0,5 roku

Przewidujemy 1-2 dni zdjęciowe (mężczyzna 4 dni)

Zlecenie płatne. Od kandydatów oczekujemy dyspozycyjności i zdolności aktorskich (nie trzeba będzie nic mówić. TATUAŻE WYKLUCZONE.
Zgłoszenia tylko przez Whatsappa, nr. 500 633 126

Odezwiemy się do wybranych osób. 

Zdjęcie poglądowe, przedstawia mniej więcej osoby, jakich szukamy.

items.text:
EDIT jutro mamy już full, ale są miejsca na sobotę! Zapraszam do kontaktu na priv ☺️

Hallo, hallo 😍

Szukam na jutro ludzi w Warszawie, którzy chcieliby wziąć udział w sesji zdjęciowej!

Zapraszamy do kontaktu wszystkich od 18-65 roku życia. Schludny, zadbany wygląd. Nie trzeba być modelem.

Hasło przewodnie: „City Break” – sesja w stylu wakacyjnego wyjazdu do miasta

Cel: Udział w projekcie technologicznym tworzącym narzędzie do odróżniania zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich (robionych telefonem).

• Prywatność: Zdjęcia są wyłącznie do użytku wewnętrznego klienta, nie zostaną nigdzie opublikowane

• Czas i kasa: 100 zł płatne w gotówce od razu po sesji. Całość zajmuje maksymalnie godzinę (realnie około 20 minut pracy)

• Dress code: Kluczowy punkt! Zakaz ubierania się w gładką czerń i gładką biel od pasa w górę. Stylizacje powinny być schludne, nowoczesne, bez czapek zasłaniających twarz

Piszcie, polecacie znajomych, mogą być to grupy przyjaciół, rodziny itd :) 

Dotyczy tylko osób pełnoletnich.

Zgłoszenia na priv.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'w Pomagasz rozwoju innowacyjnego narzędzia do analizy różnic m ę d między z fotografia profesjonalna a mobilną. CITY BREAK O Cel: Analiza, jak profesjonalny sprzęt oddaje detale w porównaniu do aparatów w smartfonach. Prywatność: Twoje zdjęcia są wykorzystywane wyłącznie do wewnętrznych analiz technicznych Brak publikacji: Twoje zdjęcia nie zostaną nigdzie opublikowane ani udostępnione publicznie.'

items.text:
Hi! We're looking for expressive people for a paid remote acting project with Canopy Labs 🎬

💰 £40/hour or £100 for ~2.5 hours total (20-30 min director call + two 60-min recorded video chats)

No scripts — just natural, guided conversation with another actor over video call. Your likeness won't be replicated; footage is purely for AI research.

You'll need:

•⁠  ⁠A smartphone + portrait orientation

•⁠  ⁠Good WiFi + 5GB free storage

•⁠  ⁠Plain background, simple clothing, quiet space

To apply, email amy@canopylabs.ai with your phone number and a quick 10-second portrait video introducing yourself (torso and hands in frame).

We're starting very soon so do get in touch asap if you're interested.

Studenci aktorstwa  do roli poszukiwani.

Z Bazy Aktorskiej "Edwin Film"

Serial "Pierwsza Miłość"

10.03 (wtorek) Wrocław.

Na wtorek 10 marca poszukuję studenta i studentki AST lub innej uczelni aktorskiej  z Bazy Edwin Film do roli Wodzireja Trupy Muzycznej oraz Dziewczyny z kapeluszem zbierającej datki od widzów podczas występów ulicznych.

Wiek 20-25 lat, poszukuję aktorów którzy  nie grali  w serialu minimum 1,5 roku.

Zapewniamy honorarium, hotel i zwrot kosztów przejazdu.

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na :

iwona.bazanska@o2.pl

(imię i nazwisko, data urodzenia, miejsce zamieszkania,  szkoła aktorska, aktualna fotografia, numer telefonu, wizytówka aktorska, link do demo/selftape)

Hasło: Wodzirej/ Dziewczyna.

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

Zapraszamy.

Agencja Aktorska Edwin Film.

items.text:
40cm × 60cm  pannel 

 
—
Matter rising from the landscape,
as if the earth suddenly began to speak in the language of color and fire.
The form is neither fully a figure nor a mountain.
It is a moment of transformation.
Layers of paint gather, drip and solidify — like lava, like the memory of a place, like a body emerging from the land.
Reds and oranges pulse against a cool, distant horizon.
Something is being born here while something else dissolves.
Energy gathers in the vertical axis of the painting, as if trying to break free from the surface and enter the space around it.
The painting becomes a trace of a process:
matter breathing, cracking, growing.
Between landscape and body.
Between silence and eruption.
#painting #contemporaryart #impasto #texturepainting #abstractfigurative artprocess malarstwo sztukawspółczesna sopotart

sharedPost.text:
40cm × 60cm  pannel 

Materia, która wyrasta z pejzażu.
Jakby ziemia nagle zaczęła mówić własnym językiem koloru i ognia.
Ta forma nie jest do końca figurą ani górą. Jest momentem przemiany.
Warstwy farby gromadzą się, spływają, krzepną — jak lawa, jak pamięć miejsca, jak ciało powstające z krajobrazu.
Czerwienie i oranże pulsują na tle chłodnego horyzontu.
Coś się tu rodzi i jednocześnie rozpada.
Energia zbiera się w pionowej osi obrazu, jakby chciała wyrwać się z powierzchni płótna i wejść w przestrzeń.
Obraz jest zapisem procesu:
materii, która oddycha, pęka, rośnie.
Między pejzażem a ciałem.
Między ciszą a erupcją.

items.text:
KATOWICE - AKTORZY - EPIZODYŚCI POSZUKIWANI
Poszukujemy do prostych scen fabularyzowanych, w filmie dokumentalnym o tematyce religijnej, osób, które wcieliłyby się w role członków wielopokoleniowej, polskiej rodziny.
1. Małżeństwo w wieku ok. 35 lat (mężczyzna, najlepiej aktor)
2. "Dziadkowie" (Pan i Pani) - 60-70 lat
3. Dziewczynka w wieku ok. 10 lat
4. Chłopczyk ok.14 lat
5. Niemowlę - max do 0,5 roku

Przewidujemy 1-2 dni zdjęciowe (mężczyzna 4 dni)

Zlecenie płatne. Od kandydatów oczekujemy dyspozycyjności i zdolności aktorskich (nie trzeba będzie nic mówić. TATUAŻE WYKLUCZONE.
Zgłoszenia tylko przez Whatsappa, nr. 500 633 126

Odezwiemy się do wybranych osób. 

Zdjęcie poglądowe, przedstawia mniej więcej osoby, jakich szukamy.

sharedPost.text:
Hej alle😊

Jeg er 22 år og kommer fra Viborg. 
Min største drøm er at blive skuespiller, og jeg vil virkelig gerne udvikle mig mere. Jeg har været statist i spillefilm, kortfilm og reklamer/kampagner og er klar på at lære endnu mere  foran kameraet.

Jeg er samarbejdsvillig, imødekommende, meget lære nem og mødestabil. ￼￼￼

Kender I til auditions, projekter eller workshops, så må I meget gerne sige til 🙌

Hvis i er interesseret, må i meget gerne skrive til mig på Messenger.￼

Tak på forhånd 
Mvh Maja

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
May be an image of one or more people and blonde hair

topComments.text: Hej Maja. Jeg er også fra Viborg. Prøv at kontakte Medieskolen i Viborg. Deres elever producerer mange kortfilm hvert år, og de bruger skuespillere udefra. Det er selvfølgelig ulønnet, men det er noget af den bedste erfaring, du kan få som skuespiller. Jeg ligger selv i deres "kartotek" og laver af og til film med deres elever.

Thursday March 12th 11am-5pm
Pro audio company is seeking a MALE model/actor

Age: 34-46

Pay: $100/hour

This shoot will take place at a professional recording studio in Los Angeles area. You will act as a music producer, explaining how to use our software and headphones in an informative video. Script is 2 pages, you will be provided a teleprompter.

Model must speak clearly and concisely and is very comfortable speaking on camera. we want someone who is a "natural" and is able to deliver the information well to a diverse audience.

To apply please message me photo AND video of you introducing yourself. Must be available on the date/time listed above.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE: TYE 🎬
We’re officially looking for the lead role of TYE!
Seeking confident, strong on-screen presence — studs preferred — but if you’re a talented actor who can fully embody the character of TYE, we want you to go for it!
TYE is bold, layered, authentic, and carries a powerful presence. This role requires emotional depth, charisma, and the ability to command the screen.
If you’re serious about your craft and ready to step into a leading role, this is your moment.
📍 Location: Los Angeles
🎥 Filming: Mid-March
📧 Submit headshot, reel (if available), and contact info to: multidimensionaldream@gmail.com
Spread the word — we’re looking for someone ready to bring TYE to life! 🔥

items.text:
Casting call for a USC Thesis film Red Fox Run, will have a festival run
Director: Scott Wilson

Logline: Ray Fox thinks he can hide a mob’s drug deal under the cover of a charity golf tournament at his family’s golf course, Red Fox Run—right up until the cops knock on the front door. An original story with heart, humor, and doing bad for the sake of good. Let's bring back the low budget comedy!

Actor Roles we need to fill are as follows;
Deadline is March 15th

We will be filming at the Griffith Park Clubhouse 

Calltime: 9:30 a.m.

Date: March 18th

50 Enthusiastic Golf Course Patrons
2 Mobsters disguised as priests

Please send actor resume and headshots to
Redfoxrunusc@gmail.com or DM Becky Bruner (this would be the best email for any information you may have) this is voluntary, includes IMBD credit as well as crafty and lunch

GENRE: COMEDY COMPENSATION: UNPAID/NONUNION, MEALS PROVIDED, CRAFTY, AND IMDB CREDIT LOOKING FOR GOLF COURSE PATRONS AND MOBSTERS DISGUISED AS PRIESTS'

items.text:
SHORT FILM CASTING CALL!!!
Casting "Waiting Room," a short film. Three siblings come to a hospital because they have been told that their dad is going in for emergency surgery that could lead to him losing his life. Whilst in the waiting room, there is a tension that hangs above all of them, of something unsaid about past abuse.

Roles: 

Willow (27-30)

Outgoing and vibrant, but there’s far more going on beneath the surface. She’s a contradiction: at times she seems unable to read the room, yet she has a deep, almost instinctive understanding of what others are feeling. This raises the question - why can she see everyone else so clearly, but not herself?

Olivia (29-32)

The matriarch of the family. She isn’t Willow and Lucas’s mother, but they both look up to her as if she were. She carries quiet authority, and with it, the weight of responsibility - she has always been the one forced to make the hard decisions. She may have sensed that Willow and Lucas were carrying something, but she never knew the full truth until now.

Shoots 27th-29th March in Salford/Manchester, TBA.

Please send your headshot, resume/spotlight with any examples of work to Kelsielea123@hotmail.com

PLEASE NOTE: These are unpaid roles! Showreel footage, travel and food expenses will be paid.

sharedPost.text:
CALLING ALL ACTORS

The Panto Theatre is casting three roles (Buttons, Cinderella, and Dame) to be featured in an upcoming documentary Directed by @elizabeth_dealande with Salt Lake Community College about our theatre. Filming will take place in March and April, with specific dates and times provided in advance.

To apply, please email jords@thepantotheatre.com with the following:

• Your resume
• Your availability for all of March and April
• A headshot (included on your resume or attached as a separate file)

No singing or acting submission is required at this stage.

Please ensure all attached or linked documents have sharing permissions enabled so they can be accessed.

Online submissions are due March 10, 2026.

items.text:
**Crew Call - Los Angeles** (Student Film)
I'm looking for crew and collaborations for a LACC student film. It will be a 1-2 day shoot, currently targeting to film March 21st-22nd. Locations are yet to be confirmed but likely around LA and Whittier.

About the film:

An informant delivers her final data drop to clear her name, only to discover she handed it to an impostor. Forced to team up with the real agent, she must race to recover the stolen drive before she loses her only way out.

At this moment, I am looking for volunteers and collaborations. This is best suited for people who are looking to either advance their skills or desire opportunities to add to their reel/experience. Copy, credit, and meals

We're currently looking for:

Producer/AD

Casting Director

Cinematographer

Script Supervisor

Costume Designer

Key Grip/Gaffer

Boom Operator

Open to other positions as well including post, please feel free to email me too if you're position is unlisted.

If interested in collaborating, please email  sarahniver@gmail.com with your desired position in the subject line along with your resume or CV and portfolio (if applicable). Thank you so much!

- umiejętność pływania 

terminy:

okres zdjęciowy: 15.04 - 05.08

przerwa w zdjęciach: 26.06 - 22.07

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać:

- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- dobrej jakości aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki (bez okularów, nakryć głowy, itp.)
- warto napisać kilka słów o sobie i dołączyć wizytówkę

Zgłoszenie należy przesłać na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com

🎥ABM Studio serdecznie zaprasza mieszkańców:

(Międzyrzecz / Krosno Odrzańskie etc.)

🟤oraz innych miejsc

Na **plan filmowy** najnowszej produkcji sensacyjnej,

realizowanej dla jednej z **największych platform streamingowych**. 🎞️

(Dla mieszkańców Zielonej Góry i Gorzowa **zorganizujemy dojazd** do Kostrzynia i powrót) 🚌

🔜Zdjęcia odbędą się 

**27, 28 i 29 marca**

w Kostrzynie nad Odrą.

‼️W tych dniach będziemy realizować zdjęcia do sceny dziejącej się na ukraińsko-polskim przejściu granicznym

(zakorkowanym przez ludzi uciekających przed wojną)

tuż po wkroczeniu Rosjan na Ukrainę.

⁉️**KOGO SZUKAMY?** 🔍

Panie w wieku 20+  50+

Panów w wieku 50+

oraz dzieci w wieku 2-14 lat

(zarówno z **Polski** jak i z **Ukrainy**)

🇵🇱 🇺🇦

**Formularz zgłoszeniowy**:

🇵🇱 po polsku - [https://form.jotform.com/260333686142354](https://form.jotform.com/260333686142354)

🇺🇦 po ukraińsku - [https://form.jotform.com/260403202473343](https://form.jotform.com/260403202473343)

👧👶dla dzieci - [https://form.jotform.com/260342789141357](https://form.jotform.com/260342789141357)

💶Stawka za dzień zdjęciowy w serialu to **130 zł** brutto.

Stawka rośnie w zależności od pory zdjęć (zdjęcia nocne 150% stawki),

ilości godzin na planie (powyżej 12 h dochodzą nadgodziny) pory rozpoczęcia / zakończenia  zdjęć, przydzielonej roli (epizod), obowiązkowej kontynuacji itd.

Jeżeli pojawisz się na planie razem ze swoim samochodem stawka rośnie do **200 zł** brutto.

🥪Produkcja na planie zapewnia ciepłe napoje i **catering**.

✅Chętnych zapraszamy do starannego **wypełnienia powyższego formularza**.

Spośród nadesłanych zgłoszeń będziemy wybierać wspólnie z pionem reżyserskim serialu szczęśliwców, których bezpośrednim telefonem zaprosimy na plan. Każda z wybranych osób dostanie szczegółowe informacje  - rola, godziny pracy, ostateczna stawka itd.

🟠Obszerniejszy opis pracy na planie zawarty jest w formularzach.

**ZAPRASZAMY !!**

items.text:
Branding for Artists: From Talent to Recognition
📅 March 15th
🕓 4:00 PM
📍 Południk Zero – Wilcza 25
Being good at what you do is no longer enough.
If you’re an artist, performer, comedian, or creative, you are already a brand, the question is whether you’re shaping it intentionally… or letting algorithms and awkward bios do it for you.
This interactive session is about clarity, presence, and visibility, without selling out, faking confidence, or turning into a LinkedIn motivational post.
We’ll explore:
How to communicate who you are in one sentence (without panicking)
The difference between talent, persona, and presence
Why some artists get booked, shared, and remembered and others don’t
Practical tools to align your stage identity with your online identity
No lectures. No corporate nonsense.
Just real talk, smart exercises, and honest feedback in a supportive, creative space.
Come if you want to be: 

✔ clearer
✔ more confident
✔ more recognizable
✔ more intentional as an artist
Leave with language, direction, and a stronger sense of “yeah, this is me.”

🎟️ tickets: https://fienta.com/pl/branding-as-an-artist

Bianca is also doing her hit Ghosted comedy show at 6 pm:

https://fienta.com/pl/ghosted-with-bianca-lala

"Hello!

I'm a professional videomaker with experience in creating high-quality video content for businesses, brands, and artists in California.

My services include:

- Video production for marketing, advertising, and social media
- Video editing and post-production
- 6K and HD filming
- Drone photography and videography
-We have high-end equipment ranging from Red Camera to Panasonic Lumix, and we handle both basic and highly relevant productions.

I understand the importance of creating engaging and effective video content that meets the needs of your business or brand.

If you're looking for a professional videomaker in California, I'm here to help!

Get in touch with me to discuss your project and how I can assist:

Marden Leão

Phone: +1628 309-1041

Instagram : @mardeng

items.text:
Open Call In Person Auditions Mon. & Tues. March 9 & 10 at 6pm for **9 to 5**, Music & Lyrics by Dolly Parton, Book by Patricia Resnick, Directed by Felisha Heng - Musical Director Chelsea Melnick, Choreographer Cassandra Reed. Performances: May 1-17; Fri. & Sat. 8pm & Sundays 2pm. Auditions @HeightsPlayers 26 Willow Place Brooklyn, NY 11201. (718) 237-2752.

 

Please prepare 32 bars of a musical theater song in the style of the show that best fits and showcases your range. Be creative! We are looking for engaging and energetic storytellers. Give your audition as much character (and camp!) as possible! Please bring a headshot and resume. An accompanist will be provided. Please bring clearly marked sheet music in the correct key and do not sing acapella. There will NOT be a dance call at auditions. Only those invited to callbacks will participate in a dance call.

 

We are seeking a diverse cast of performers for a range of roles. Performers of all genders are encouraged to audition for ALL roles, we are casting all roles without gender restrictions. BIPOC and LGBTQIA+ performers are strongly encouraged to audition.

 

NO pay.

 

**Character Breakdown:**

**Violet Newstead**: The company's Head Secretary and Mr. Hart's Administrative Assistant, she is a single mother and typically stands up for what she believes in. Attractive, strong, ambitious. Age 40 to 50

**Doralee Rhodes**: A young, sexy spitfire who works at Mr. Hart's office. She is proof that there is more to a woman than just her looks. Age: 20 to 30

**Judy Bernly**: The "new" girl at the firm, she has been burned by her husband's affair and is searching for personal empowerment. Insecure, determined, and hopeful. Age: 30 to 35

**Franklin Hart, JR.** : One of the firm's executives and a notorious chauvinist. He is capable of faking charm but usually shows his true colors as an arrogant, self-absorbed boss. Age: 45 to 50

**Roz Keith**: The attentive office gossip queen and snitch. She has an unrequited love for Mr. Hart and will do anything she can to win his approval. Age: 35 to 45

**Joe**: A handsome, young office accountant. Genuine and nice, and smitten with Violet. Age: 25 to 35

**Dwayne**: Doralee's attractive husband. He is very supportive of her professional pursuits. Age: 25 to 30

**Josh**: Violet's awkward teenage son. Age: 15 to 18

**Missy**: Franklin Hart's wife, clueless to her husband's true nature. Age: 20 to 35

**Maria**: A young and vibrant secretary in Hart's office. Age: 20 to 30

**Dick**: Judy's soon-to-be ex-husband. An average guy, he is sporting a little less hair and a little more paunch than he did ten years ago. Age: 35 to 45

**Kathy**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to gossip. Age: 30 to 40

**Margaret**: A secretary in Hart's office with a tendency to drink. Age: 30 to 40

**Tinsworthy**: Franklin Hart's boss and Chairman of the Board. A good man, who may be wiser to Hart's ways than he lets on. Age: 50 to 65

**Ensemble**: Office employees, police officers, hospital employees.

[https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/](https://www.facebook.com/share/1ERq3wnkhh/)

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

Fitting: Mar. 12th Filming: Mar. 13th and/or Mar. 28th COMPENSATION $1000+ 20% PER DAY FILMING $3000 20% USAGE BUYOUT DEADLINE: FRIDAY, MARCH 6TH 6TH.6 6 PM PST'

topComments.text:
Genre : comedy, drama 

Based in : UK 

Recorded in : the Wirral 
Filming locations : Wirral 
Filming date : April/may - ongoing 

Premise : an unlikely group of friends from a multitude of backgrounds including highschool drop outs, educated college students, and even a low time drug dealer. Set between 2000s and 2015, this series shows friendship is messy and chaotic, pulling no punches, this group is unpredictable and at times emotional, but always "real". 

Tone : nostalgic, friendly, comedic, 

Characters : 

.Izzy pastel - smart student with a down to earth personality, attends college, always having banter with the lads and able to keep up, mental sparring is her Forte. [ Free ] 

.Jamie "ash" carter - rough around the edges but lovable, college drop out ( kick out), enjoys art, joking, and smoking. 
[ Taken ] 

.Ryan carter - older brother to Jamie. Shy, calm, and reserved, doesn't talk much but when he does it's comedy gold. 
[ Free ] 

.Eddie sharp - close friends with the carter brothers, they all went to school together, consistently unemployed, low time drug dealer. 
[ Taken ] 

.Callum nightly - loves being the centre of attention, close friendship with Eddie due to consist drug use. Can sometimes be erratic. 
[ Free ] 

. Sophie frost - blonde, chaotic, extreme drug user, loves raves festivals and flirting, the group help her slow down from her fast paced lifestyle. 
[ Free ] 

.Ethan shroud - althletic rugby player, trains week days, parties weekends, knows his limits and dosnt take things too far, slightly better off than the rest of the group but always shares the wealth. 
[ Free ] 

Simon Skinner "psycho si" - local bully, always taking stuff from the group, hates everyone, hated by everyone. Loose cannon, can switch mood in an instance.
[ Free ] 

EXTRAS : 
all extra positions available 

Production crew : 
Director
Sound engineer
Editer 

Pay and travel : possible compensation | travel covered | 

Credits : full credits with legal or chosen name 

Character wardrobes : 

.Jamie "ash" carter - button up shirts, patterns, jeans, denim jackets, caps,

.Ryan carter - hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Izzy pastel - jumpers, skirts, jeans, hoodies, 

.Eddie sharp - tracksuits, beanies, trainers, 

.Ethan shroud - jumpers, sports jerseys, jeans, boots,

.Callum nightly - windbreakers, tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Evie Owens - shirts, jeans, leopard prints 

.Simon Skinner "psycho Simon" - tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, caps, Burberry 

NOTE : MUST BE COMFORTABLE SMOKING EFFECT CIGARETTES

items.text:
Motzmobil auf Pro7, Christian Weiße trifft Pfarrer Nils Petrat bei Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst echte Antworten, warum Kirche Alltag aufgreift, aktuelle Themen deutet und offene Fragen nicht fürchten muss. 

In diesem kurzen Motzmobil Statement auf Pro7 triffst Du zusammen mit mir, Christian Weiße, auf Pfarrer Nils Petrat, im Umfeld von Alpha Entertainment. Du bekommst direkt erklärt, warum das Format so gebaut ist, Alltag aufzunehmen und daraus eine klare Message zu machen, mit ethischer Botschaft und kirchlicher Botschaft, ohne moralischen Zeigefinger. 

Du hörst, wie Pfarrer Nils den Kern beschreibt, Kirche ist nicht nur Ritual, sondern Gespräch über das, was Dich im Alltag wirklich trifft. Genau deshalb werden aktuelle Themen aufgegriffen und gedeutet, damit aus Erlebnissen Sinn werden kann. 

Wir gehen auch auf den Reibungspunkt ein, den viele denken, tritt man mit speziellen Fragen in der Kirche jemandem auf die Füße, oder ist Kirche heute so weit, dass genau diese Offenheit gebraucht wird. Dieses Video ist damit ein schneller Reality Check, wie modern Kirche sein kann, wenn sie sich nicht versteckt. 

Wenn Du mehr willst, schau in die Motzmobil Videogalerie und in weitere Clips aus dem Umfeld, damit Du mehr Key Moments zu Glauben, Kirche und Alltag bekommst. 

Abo, Glocke, Like und dann schreib Deine Frage unten rein, damit wir die nächsten Motzmobil Themen daran ausrichten. 

Welche Frage zu Glauben und Kirche würdest Du heute offen stellen, wenn niemand Dich dafür bewertet?

Links und Ressourcen https://katholisch.de/ 

Motzmobil Videogalerie https://katholisch.de/videoserie/68-prosieben-motzmobil 

Hier bekommst Du Interviews, Statements und Mini Formate zu Alltag, Medien und Sinnfragen. 

Welche konkrete Alltagsszene hat Dich zuletzt zweifeln lassen, und welche Antwort würdest Du Dir von Kirche wünschen? 

Abonniere, aktiviere die Glocke und gib dem Video ein Like 

Kommentiere Deine Frage und klick danach in die Motzmobil Playlist 

Teile das Video und markiere eine Person, die Kirche moderner denkt! 

Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion 

#motzmobil #pro7 #kirchemodern #glaube

# Testkunden gesucht - Kostenlose Website 

Hallo, ich möchte mich kurz Vorstellen. Mein Name ist Emanuel und ich bin seit einigen Jahren in der Software Entwicklung aktiv.

Vor kurzen habe ich mich dann selbstständig gemacht und biete aktuell eine Website Erstellung komplett kostenlos an, um Referenzen zu finden. 

Dafür kümmere ich mich zudem jedoch auch um SEO Optimierung Domain etc.

Solltest du also schonmal darüber nachgedacht haben deine Online Präsenz zu verbessern, biete ich dir die perfekte Möglichkeit dies kostenlos zu tun.

Weitere Software

Zudem biete ich auch andere Software Lösungen an. Da ich auch hier nach Referenzen suche, sind diese sehr kostengünstig. Beispielsweise Organisationstools, Tools zu Online Reservierungen, oder Online Vereinbarung von Terminen u.ä.

Klingt das für dich spannend? Schick gerne eine PN

items.text: The casting for all other roles has been filled, but sadly The Production team is struggling to reach an older demographic of actors! Deadline is 20th of March to apply. All details in the post 🎭

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL 📣 PLEASE SHARE 🎭

We are looking for 3 male actors to star in our new upcoming show “A Curtain Calls” at the Epstein theatre in Liverpool city centre in July 2026. Please note we are based in Liverpool, Merseyside so our rehearsals will be taking place in the city centre and it is a PAID PROFIT SHARE production. If any of these characters capture your attention then give us a shout we would love to hear from you ! 🎭 you must be 18+ to apply . For all enquires/ Audition material, please email our admin team at Glassdoorproductions.19@gmail.com ⭐️💫

items.text:
**ATTENTION ACTORS/READERS!!**

Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole are doing a virtual table read for Emily's feature film script "Marshlights" on Sunday, March 15th from 2-5pm and are in need of actors to read the roles. Emily is seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future. 

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately. 

Roles will be cast on a first come, first serve basis. 

**The narration role and the role of Mrs. Ashford have already been cast.**

Marshlights Table Read

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read. 

WHEN: Sunday, March 15th @ 2-5pm

WHO: Written by Emily Stephens, Casting by Emily Stephens and Mary Beth Eversole

PROJECT NAME: Marshlights (91 pages)

SUMMARY: The revelation of a young trans woman in a small post-reconstruction town in South Carolina causes confusion and ultimately a showdown with local white supremacist theology leading to a violent reckoning.

CHARACTERS:

 

**Luke/Lucy** (white/early 20s, trans actors are encouraged to submit):  a trans woman who is the child of an aristocratic line, her father a Colonel from the civil war. She's curious, and (post-transition) lively even flirtatious.

**Mark** (black/mid 20s): a constant servant for Lucy and her family. He is deeply loyal and kind. He accepts Lucy's transition and does his best to protect her.

**Esau **(white/early 20s): Lucy's best friend and son of the local pastor. Esau wrestles endlessly with Luke/Lucy who he loves and the expectations and fragility of his own masculinity.

**Pastor Green** (white/late 40s): a deeply patriarchal true believer of a white supremacist theology that grants the town his version of order.

**Colonel Ashford** (white/late 50s): former civil war Colonel and very rigid man with a distinct conception of masculinity defined through labor and sweat.

**Mahala** (black/late 50s): former slave and a major part of the black community. Honest and powerful keeper of community memory and folklore.

**Amos**(black/30s): a seminary trainee black preacher who acts as the less folkloric spiritual leader. Hard working to support his community and it's elders.

**Mrs. Prioleau**(black/40s): keeper of community after Mahala's death. Focused on keeping her community safe.

**Saint Lucia** (mythic): the literal embodiment of the saint appears to help Lucy be revealed. She is disconnected from time.

There are number of smaller or unnamed characters for small scenes, the readers of Saint Lucia and Mrs. Prioleau will cover those roles. 

SUBMIT TO: marybetheversole@gmail.com with YOUR NAME, YOUR EMAIL, THE ROLE YOU ARE SUBMITTING FOR, and if you can commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. 

**Please do not submit if you cannot commit to the entire timeframe for the table read. **

**Please only submit to roles you feel you could portray accurately.**

items.text:
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 
Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of tree and text that says 'LONE L Ο E TREE LONETREE T R E ARTS CENTER'

topComments.text: OMG she is everything - I was raised on her music, I fall to pieces because she's got you, then when I go walking after midnight because asleep it's always sweet dreams of you.

items.text:
Hi FIND-ers! The Women in Film and Media Colorado annual Industry Fair is this weekend! We are celebrating our 10 year anniversary this year and things are bigger and better than ever! Lunch is included with your ticket each day! Link in the comments to get your tickets. If Cost is an issue, please reach out and we can figure something out!

Opening Night   | February 27 | 7 pm 

Start the Industry Fair the best way possible— with a drink in hand and a room full of filmmakers ready to connect. Join us for the Opening Night Cocktail Party at [Cabin House Studios](https://www.cabinhousestudios.com/), featuring powerhouse Miranda Bailey in conversation—a candid, energizing chat packed with real-world insight and creative momentum.

Day 1 | February 28 | 9am - 6pm

Community College of Aurora
9075 E Lowry Blvd, Denver, CO 80230

Dive into developing and marketing a vertical/web series, sharpen your interview looks with Mary Jeanes & Cheshire Li or learn insider tips on freelancing from Shawna Schultz.   Prefer hands-on storytelling? Jump into a two-part scene lab or catch a directing workshop with a Hollywood director Sarah Adina Smith. Spend the afternoon discovering the ins and outs of festivals with Eileen O'Brien, learn about Colorado’s refundable tax credit or check out the detailed craft of special effects makeup with Stephanie Lane and Michelle Knoebel. Wrap the day with industry insights on the director/casting director relationship with Nell Teare and Jamie Castro and a final panel on "Breaking IN: How did you do that?

Day 2 | March 1 | 9am - 6pm

Learn the *Principles of Film Adaptation with *Trai Cartwright, *Audition Techniques from a TV & Film Casting Director with Jamie Castro Casting* or jump into hands-on sessions like *Scene Lab Day 2*. The afternoon keeps the momentum going with a short documentary session with Jenna Red, filmmaking career strategy with Roe Moore, *Best Practices for Auditions & Callbacks with Intimacy* and everyone’s favorite stunts workshop with Sara Salazar & friends.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'INDUSTRV FAIR WOMEN IN FILM & ILM&MEDIA MEDIA -Colorado FEB 27- MAR 2026 OUR ANNUAL WEEKEND OF HANDS-ONWORKSHOPS, HANDS-ON WORKSHOPS, INDUSTRY PANELS AND COLORADO FILM COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS. PASSES ON SALE NOW! www.wifmco.org/industry-fai-2026 2026 COMMUNITY COLLEGE of AURORA cabin house #개체하의'

items.text:
EDIT na jutro już FULL, ale są terminy na sobotę!

Proszę o zgłoszenia na priv z imieniem, nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu i preferowaną godziną między 8-15.

Hallo, hallo 😍

Szukam na SOBOTĘ ludzi w Warszawie, którzy chcieliby wziąć udział w sesji zdjęciowej!

Zapraszamy do kontaktu wszystkich od 18-65 roku życia. Schludny, zadbany wygląd. Nie trzeba być modelem.

Hasło przewodnie: „City Break” – sesja w stylu wakacyjnego wyjazdu do miasta

Cel: Udział w projekcie technologicznym tworzącym narzędzie do odróżniania zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich (robionych telefonem).

• Prywatność: Zdjęcia są wyłącznie do użytku wewnętrznego klienta, nie zostaną nigdzie opublikowane

• Czas i kasa: 100 zł płatne w gotówce od razu po sesji. Całość zajmuje maksymalnie godzinę (realnie około 20 minut pracy)

• Dress code: Kluczowy punkt! Zakaz ubierania się w gładką czerń i gładką biel od pasa w górę. Stylizacje powinny być schludne, nowoczesne, bez czapek zasłaniających twarz

Piszcie, polecacie znajomych, mogą być to grupy przyjaciół, rodziny itd :) 

Dotyczy tylko osób pełnoletnich.

Cel: Analiza, jak profesjonalny sprzęt oddaje detale w porównaniu do aparatów w smartfonach. Prywatność: Twoje zdjęcia są wykorzystywane wyłącznie do wewnętrznych analiz technicznych Brak publikacji: Twoje zdjęcia nie zostaną nigdzie opublikowane ani udostępnione publicznie.'

items.text: Looking for experienced electric keyboard players for a PAID TVC commercial 🎬

sharedPost.text:
🎹 CASTING CALL – ELECTRIC KEYBOARD PIANISTS 🎹

We’re looking for experienced Electric Keyboard Pianists to feature in an upcoming PAID TV commercial shooting in Cape Town.

Requirements:
• Experienced keyboard players
• Age 35 – 55 years
• Any ethnicity
• Based in Cape Town

📅 Shoot: early March 2026
⏰ Submission Deadline: 9 March 2026

If you (or someone you know) fits the brief, please send:
• Your name & age
• A recent photo
• A short video of you playing keyboard (if available)
• Your contact details

📩 Send submissions to: casting@zestcasting.com

🎧 INTERNATIONAL DJ – AVAILABLE 2026

Professional DJ with 7 years of experience performing House, Afro House, Disco and Funk.

✔️ Available for international club, hotel and resort contracts
✔️ Experience performing at parties and events
✔️ Long DJ sets (3–5 hours+)
✔️ Strong dancefloor and groove-focused music selection

Open to seasonal and year-round contracts in clubs, hotels, resorts and beach venues worldwide.

items.text:
🎬 GREAT SCREEN ACTING ISN’T JUST ABOUT SHOWING EMOTION —

IT’S ABOUT GENERATING THE RIGHT ONE, TRUTHFULLY.

In this Masterclass, I take you inside and explore the directors process for working with actors for film and television.

Scripts are not instructions — they are blueprints, layered with meaning, intention and emotional truth that often sits well beneath the surface, and you must be able to read those hidden levels to respond to what the story truly requires.

As a director, I understand how to shape emotional flow across a scene and guide an actor to exactly what the story needs. 

As a screenwriter, I know how to infer the hidden emotional layers beneath the dialogue.

As an actor, you must use your own experience and perception to inhabit the character’s world fully then play your own internal emotional landscape — with timing, control and sensitivity — in tune with the story.

Then you your work becomes truthful, compelling and eminently castable.

This class will explore all of the above subjects and is open to anyone who is interested. 

📅 **Date & Time**
Wednesday 25th March 2026
7.30pm – 9.00pm UK Time 

🧾 **How to Book**
For all details including how to reserve your place-go to:
https://screen-acting.com/masterclass

And if you have any questions, just pop them in the comments.

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat do roli Eli**

Szukamy skarbu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje dziewczyny 18 – 20 lat młodo wyglądającej do roli Eli najlepiej mieszkającej w Gliwicach lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice najdalej ) Postać będzie mieć dialogi po polsku. Szukamy osób bez farbowanych włosów czy malowanych paznokciach.

 

Młoda 20 letnia** **dziewczyna. Wysoka i szczupła o długich włosach. W czasie okupacji niemieckiej razem z Stefanem i Wandą uczestniczą w kilku akcjach patriotycznych ,które na celu mają m.in. klejenie na murach plakatów. Podczas jednej z akcji ratuje Wandę i Stefana przed śmiercią z ręki niemieckiego żołnierza strzelając do niego z broni ojca wcześniej pożyczonej. Podkochuje się w Stefanie ale nie mówi mi tego na początku.

** **

Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzny do roli żandarmerii państowej**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje mężczyzny **w wieku 25 – 40 lat** **bez zarostu w obwodzie klatki 90 – 95 i pasie 85 – 90 o wzroście najlepiej 175 **do roli niemieckiego Schultzpolizei. Postać ta wystąpi w 3 scenach z czego w 2 będzie mieć kilka kwestii po niemiecku. Kostium będzie podobny do tego umieszczonego w załączniku.

** **

 Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

🎭 Animatorka / Klaun – współpraca przy eventach i projektach artystycznych
Kolorowa, energiczna animatorka dziecięca podejmie współpracę przy eventach, animacjach oraz projektach artystycznych jako klaun / postać sceniczna.

Posiadam własny kostium klauna, doświadczenie w pracy z dziećmi podczas urodzin, pikników rodzinnych, festynów oraz wydarzeń okolicznościowych. Na scenie stawiam na humor, kontakt z publicznością i dobrą energię.

Chętnie wezmę udział w: • wydarzeniach dla dzieci

• eventach plenerowych

• animacjach scenicznych

• projektach artystycznych i castingach

📞 Kontakt: 782 211 994

@everyone

**THE FIRST OFFICIAL TEASER TRAILER FOR N.E.S.T. PROJECT IS OUT NOW!**

Along with our Crowdfunder to help boost us through the rest of this production and bring the full quality of the film to life.

[https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/qr/VyYXm25n?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=shortlink](https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/qr/VyYXm25n?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=shortlink)

**N.E.S.T. Project **has and continues to be a fully volunteer based production with funds raised via the Crowdfunder being contributed towards the Production Design, SFX and Make Up and to help us secure locations for the rest of the film. Any donation is hugely appreciated and will help boost us to finish the production of the film to the highest standard it can be.

Additionally, we are still on the hunt to grow our crew so, if you want to get involved, reach out to **info@emberproduction.com**

items.text:
We’re casting Cantonese, Mandarin, Korean, and Vietnamese speakers for a short public service announcement supporting Asian Smokers’ Quitline, a California nonprofit helping Asian communities quit smoking for 30+ years.

Roles needed:
• Male (25–30)
• Female (45–50+)
• Male (60–70+)
Native/fluent speakers required.

Details:
• Non-union, unpaid
• Filming in the NYC Tri-State area
• Fast turnaround – shooting ASAP

To submit:
Send a short audition video delivering one of the lines in your native language (examples: “I’m Ready,” “I’m Ready to Quit,” or “I’m Ready to Think About Quitting”). Each performer will appear in 15–30 second videos speaking one line in their language.

**CALL OUT FOR CAST FOR MARRIAGE!**

Fruitcake Productions is looking for cast for our new mentorship production in London as part of the **First Slice Initiative**.

This program supports emerging artists by giving them the chance to step into new creative roles. Actors will work with directors, develop their craft, and receive **free headshots and a filmed stage showreel scene**.

The show is a new ensemble play set during a chaotic hens’ night that explores queer marriage, friendship, and unresolved past relationships.

**Deadline: March 13**

Apply: [https://forms.gle/NhgfreVYEEHsGwYf7](https://forms.gle/NhgfreVYEEHsGwYf7)

items.text:
Calling all Sustainable Crafty Pros! 🍎♻️
Are you a Crafty professional who’s passionate about cutting down on single-use plastics and food waste on set?

Planet in Mind is looking for sustainable-minded Crafty vendors and experts to join our Sustainable Production Practices Showcase during LA Climate Week (April 8th–15th)!

We want to give you a platform (and a booth!) to show the industry how the Crafty table can be both delicious and eco-friendly. Whether you’ve mastered bulk-buying, compostable swap-outs, or zero-waste setups, we want you to be part of the conversation.

You’ll be alongside leaders from the Mayor’s Office of Energy & Sustainability, the Sustainable Entertainment Alliance, and the Green Film School Alliance as we show the industry "what happens when we get it right" - the theme of LA Climate Week.

Interested in hosting a booth or sharing your expertise?

Please reach out to me directly at: tauna@planetinmind.earth

Let’s make LA sets greener, one snack at a time! 🌿🎬

#LAClimateWeek #SustainableFilm #Crafty #GreenProduction #FilmCrewLA #PlanetInMind

items.text:
**CASTING CALL**

We are currently casting for an independent short film shooting in Los Angeles in June. Production will take place over 3 days (TBD on exact dates). 

**Logline:**

Pushed to the brink by his demanding father, a thirteen-year-old spelling prodigy must decide whether to win a high-stakes championship or intentionally sabotage a spelling bee.

**Cast Descriptions:**

VINNY SINGH (Age Range: 11-15)

Lead. South Asian.

Rate: $500 Flat

A lanky, awkward spelling prodigy who carries the weight of his father’s immense expectations in his nervous, picking fingers. He is anxious and introverted, but deeply observant.  

VIKRAM SINGH (Age Range 6-9)

Supporting. South Asian.

Rate: $250 Flat

The adorable, oblivious younger brother who is more interested in his Game Boy than the high-stakes drama unfolding around him. He is playful, curious, and sweet.  

AARON (Age Range 11-15)

Supporting. Open Ethnicity. 

Rate: $250 Flat

Calm and self-assured, Aaron is the steady, razor-sharp finalist who stands between Vinny and the championship.

BOBBY SINGH (Age Range: Late 30s-50s)

Supporting. South Asian.

Rate: $500 Flat

A weathered, intense patriarch who operates less like a father and more like a ruthless boxing coach. He loves his children, but he loves winning more.  

**Submission Requirements:**
* Headshot
* Resume
* Reel or recent self-tape
* Slate (name, age, height, location)
* Parent/guardian contact (if under 18)
* Availability for June shoot dates in Los Angeles
* 

*Sides will be sent to selected actors after initial submission review.*

Please send all material to: cyuscasting@gmail.com

topComments.text: If you’re looking for background too, I have 3 kids with permits and acting experience

items.text:
Hi! We're looking for expressive people for a paid remote acting project with Canopy Labs 🎬

💰 £40/hour or £100 for ~2.5 hours total (20-30 min director call + two 60-min recorded video chats)

No scripts — just natural, guided conversation with another actor over video call. Your likeness won't be replicated; footage is purely for AI research.

You'll need:

•⁠  ⁠A smartphone + portrait orientation

•⁠  ⁠Good WiFi + 5GB free storage

•⁠  ⁠Plain background, simple clothing, quiet space

To apply, email amy@canopylabs.ai with your phone number and a quick 10-second portrait video introducing yourself (torso and hands in frame).

We're starting very soon so do get in touch asap if you're interested.
