items.summary: Interested in position "pianist"
items.title: Interested in position "pianist"

items.text:
👋 Hallo zusammen,

ich bin **Existenzgründungsberater** und unterstütze Menschen dabei, **strukturiert und gefördert in die Selbstständigkeit** zu starten – je nach Situation z. B. über den **Gründungszuschuss der Agentur für Arbeit** oder über passende Fördermöglichkeiten im Zusammenhang mit dem **Jobcenter**.

Warum ich hier poste:
In vielen Gruppen rund um Selbstständigkeit sehe ich, dass viele mit einer guten Idee starten wollen, aber oft an denselben Punkten hängen:
* **Welche Förderung kommt überhaupt infrage?**
* **Welche Voraussetzungen müssen erfüllt sein?**
* **Wie gehe ich den Antrag richtig an?**
* **Wo fange ich am besten an, ohne Zeit zu verlieren?**

Genau dabei unterstütze ich.
Mein Fokus:

✅ Klarheit über Fördermöglichkeiten (Agentur für Arbeit / Jobcenter)
✅ Strukturierter Start in die Selbstständigkeit
✅ Unterstützung bei der Vorbereitung von Förderanträgen
✅ Orientierung zu Voraussetzungen, Ablauf und nächsten Schritten
Dein Vorteil (kurz auf den Punkt):

➡️ **mehr Klarheit** statt Informationschaos
➡️ **weniger Fehler** bei Vorbereitung und Antrag
➡️ **mehr Sicherheit** beim Start in die Selbstständigkeit
➡️ **schneller ins Handeln kommen** mit einem klaren Plan

Wenn du gerade über den Schritt in die Selbstständigkeit nachdenkst oder bereits gestartet bist und wissen möchtest, welche Möglichkeiten es für deinen Fall gibt, kannst du mir gern eine **PN** schreiben.
Auch Gruppenadmins oder Unternehmer:innen, die das Thema für ihre Community interessant finden, dürfen sich gerne melden. 🤝

Viele Grüße

items.text:
If you loved KENREX or Cruise, then next week come to The Show People Podcast LIVE at The Two Brewers in Clapham with special guest: Jack Holden.

We’ll be exploring his life and career as an actor, writer and storyteller, and the lessons he’s learned along the way, from the fringe, to the West End and now... Broadway.

It’s an intimate live recording, with only 100 seats available and all profits support LGBTQIA+ theatre projects.

🗓️ Wednesday 11th March 2026 | 7:30pm - 10pm
📍 The Two Brewers, 114 Clapham High Street, London SW4 7UJ

Tickets available via the Queer Theatre website

items.text: Hey guys. Diversity Pantomine Productions are looking for someone to play Hatchet (can be performed by an actor of any gender and preferably an adult) in our upcoming pantomine, Hansel and Gretal. (A comedy character). The group is based in Blackwood (Cefyn Forest, Miners Institute) and is on a Friday, 6 until 8. Role isn’t paid. A payment of £3 must be paid every rehearsal, in order for us to purchase the set, costume. Etc. Link to the place - https://maps.app.goo.gl/nY9UJLLHnvkremQW7?g_st=ic. Dates of our shows are are 27 and 28th June.

Thank you x

items.text:
Hi! We're looking for expressive people for a paid remote acting project with Canopy Labs 🎬

💰 £40/hour or £100 for ~2.5 hours total (20-30 min director call + two 60-min recorded video chats)

No scripts — just natural, guided conversation with another actor over video call. Your likeness won't be replicated; footage is purely for AI research.

You'll need:

•⁠  ⁠A smartphone + portrait orientation

•⁠  ⁠Good WiFi + 5GB free storage

•⁠  ⁠Plain background, simple clothing, quiet space

To apply, email amy@canopylabs.ai with your phone number and a quick 10-second portrait video introducing yourself (torso and hands in frame).

We're starting very soon so do get in touch asap if you're interested.

items.text:
UPDATED: NOW OFFERING RELOCATION FOR THE RIGHT CANDIDATE

 

If you know of an Executive/ Personal Assistant that has worked for UHNW or A-list celebs long term and is looking for work in NYC, please send them my way! This is 100% a lifestyle position and the people who will be considered will have had solid experience over the past 5-10 years (minimum) with ONE to TWO heavily traveled, fast paced principals full time. If you have had more than three positions over the past 10 years you will not be considered, proven longevity in a fast paced environment is what this client is looking for. 

Feel free to share with qualified candidates and please do not DM me on FB. Send resumes to Bridget@slggroupstaffing.com or call me at (347)405-1665

Thank you! 

EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / PERSONAL ASSISTANT (ON-CALL HANDLER)-NEW YORK, NY (Relocation offered for the right candidate)

This role supports a high-profile founder/chief creative consultant/senior executive leadership individual within a global premium fashion brand. The Executive Assistant/Personal Assistant serves as a trusted, on-call handler across professional priorities managing all and more including personal logistics. The principal is highly particular, fast-moving, exceptionally smart and requires a calm, polished partner who can operate with total discretion and urgency.

This is a demanding role with true on-call availability that requires a 24/7 mindset and flexibility. The outgoing assistant has provided extended notice to allow for thoughtful hands-on training

Requirements

24/7 on-call availability (non-negotiable)

High discretion, privacy-first mindset; comfort signing multiple NDAs plus confidentiality documents

Prior support experience within celebrity, high-profile, or ultra-visible environments

Excellent written communication plus strong verbal presence (polished, concise, precise)

Tech savvy; comfort managing international scheduling plus time zones

Experience coordinating private jet travel (fractional programs plus commercial travel)

Ability to travel as needed, including occasional support from personal residences

Qualifications

Type A, detail-obsessed, proactive, plus highly organized

Strong judgment, strong boundaries, plus exceptional confidentiality

“Listen-first” communication style (thoughtful, measured, well-informed)

Calm under pressure; able to adjust quickly to last-minute change

Comfortable coordinating across drivers, household staff, vendors, building staff, plus internal teams

Prior long-tenure support roles strongly preferred

Responsibilities

Calendar + scheduling management

Manage the principal’s calendar, screening requests for meetings, appearances, events, calls, plus personal appointments

Build schedules that protect focus time, travel time, plus realistic transitions

Keep meetings within allotted time to maintain schedule integrity

On-call handler support

Respond promptly to time-sensitive changes outside standard business hours

Act as a trusted point of contact for urgent needs, updates, plus pivots

Daily coordination + logistics

Coordinate with drivers, household staff, office personnel to ensure seamless arrivals, departures, plus daily flow

Prepare for in-person meetings: room readiness, supplies, refreshments, light reset post-meeting

Order plus plate meals in office as needed

Manage inventory of personal items used for styling shoots plus prototyping

Prepare decks for meetings plus general information sharing

Home events + personal support

Plan plus manage events at the principal’s home: vendors (catering, waitstaff, décor, entertainment, rentals), building coordination, invites, guest lists

Coordinate glam for personal plus business events, including travel for hair plus makeup professionals (air, rail, Eurostar)

Provide typing support for edits: speeches, scripts, written interview responses, reference letters

Location: New York City, NY

Schedule: Full-time, highly flexible schedule with significant after-hours responsiveness. Ongoing on-call expectations. 24/7 mindset required

Salary + Benefits: $200,000–$250,000 base salary, plus bonus potential. Strong long-term opportunity with a principal known for taking care of her people

Employment is contingent upon a clear background check and verification of professional employer references

items.summary:
UPDATED: NOW OFFERING RELOCATION FOR THE RIGHT CANDIDATE

 

If you know of an Executive/ Personal Assistant that has worked for UHNW or A-list celebs long term and is looking for work in NYC, please send them my way! This is 100% a lifestyle position and the people who will be considered will have had solid experience over the past 5-10 years (minimum) with ONE to TWO heavily traveled, fast paced principals full time. If you have had more than three positions over the past 10 years you will not be considered, proven longevity in a fast paced environment is what this client is looking for. 

Feel free to share with qualified candidates and please do not DM me on FB. Send resumes to Bridget@slggroupstaffing.com or call me at (347)405-1665

Thank you! 

EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / PERSONAL ASSISTANT (ON-CALL HANDLER)-NEW YORK, NY (Relocation offered for the right candidate)

This role supports a high-profile founder/chief creative consultant/senior executive leadership individual within a global premium fashion brand. The Executive Assistant/Personal Assistant serves as a trusted, on-call handler across professional priorities managing all and more including personal logistics. The principal is highly particular, fast-moving, exceptionally smart and requires a calm, polished partner who can operate with total discretion and urgency.

This is a demanding role with true on-call availability that requires a 24/7 mindset and flexibility. The outgoing assistant has provided extended notice to allow for thoughtful hands-on training

Requirements

24/7 on-call availability (non-negotiable)

High discretion, privacy-first mindset; comfort signing multiple NDAs plus confidentiality documents

Prior support experience within celebrity, high-profile, or ultra-visible environments

Excellent written communication plus strong verbal presence (polished, concise, precise)

Tech savvy; comfort managing international scheduling plus time zones

Experience coordinating private jet travel (fractional programs plus commercial travel)

Ability to travel as needed, including occasional support from personal residences

Qualifications

Type A, detail-obsessed, proactive, plus highly organized

Strong judgment, strong boundaries, plus exceptional confidentiality

“Listen-first” communication style (thoughtful, measured, well-informed)

Calm under pressure; able to adjust quickly to last-minute change

Comfortable coordinating across drivers, household staff, vendors, building staff, plus internal teams

Prior long-tenure support roles strongly preferred

Responsibilities

Calendar + scheduling management

Manage the principal’s calendar, screening requests for meetings, appearances, events, calls, plus personal appointments

Build schedules that protect focus time, travel time, plus realistic transitions

Keep meetings within allotted time to maintain schedule integrity

On-call handler support

Respond promptly to time-sensitive changes outside standard business hours

Act as a trusted point of contact for urgent needs, updates, plus pivots

Daily coordination + logistics

Coordinate with drivers, household staff, office personnel to ensure seamless arrivals, departures, plus daily flow

Prepare for in-person meetings: room readiness, supplies, refreshments, light reset post-meeting

Order plus plate meals in office as needed

Manage inventory of personal items used for styling shoots plus prototyping

Prepare decks for meetings plus general information sharing

Home events + personal support

Plan plus manage events at the principal’s home: vendors (catering, waitstaff, décor, entertainment, rentals), building coordination, invites, guest lists

Coordinate glam for personal plus business events, including travel for hair plus makeup professionals (air, rail, Eurostar)

Provide typing support for edits: speeches, scripts, written interview responses, reference letters

Location: New York City, NY

Schedule: Full-time, highly flexible schedule with significant after-hours responsiveness. Ongoing on-call expectations. 24/7 mindset required

Salary + Benefits: $200,000–$250,000 base salary, plus bonus potential. Strong long-term opportunity with a principal known for taking care of her people

Employment is contingent upon a clear background check and verification of professional employer references

If commercials feel intimidating, our A–Z Commercial Acting Class helps you understand what casting is looking for and how to bring your personality into the room!

Learn more about the A–Z Commercial Acting Class here: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes/#a-z-commercial-acting

items.text:
PERFORMER CALL OUT✨

We are Afterglow, a new theatre company based in Yorkshire. We are looking for people to get involved with an R&D for our new show, Cracked Spines✨

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdDhfFmInNfxAAouzggiRMQh2VvJHWjcWw35GAj2mDSdRRYug/viewform

The R&D will include script work, movement, directorial exercises, and music. This event will be held 10:00-14:00 on Monday 30th March at Theatre@41 in York. Please note, this is an unpaid opportunity. We hope to see you there!✨

APPLICATIONS CLOSE WEDNESDAY 18TH MARCH AND WE WILL CONTACT ALL APPLICANTS ON FRIDAY 20TH MARCH✨

Any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us. Our Instagram is afterglowtheatrecompany, and our email is general@afterglowtheatre.co.uk✨

“Everything outside the tunnel isn’t real, it’s just you, and it, and the wasting of time.” 
Amber’s stuck in the same repetitive cycle every month, it’s inevitable what’s to come. She waits with bated breath to collapse for a week, regain her strength and repeat the same thing again next month. Is this who she truly is, the kind of person to snap at the most minuscule thing, or is there some deeper issue going on that can’t be seen to the naked eye? 
Cracked Spines brings to light the lows, the struggles and the consequences of PMDD (Pre Menstrual Dysphoric Disorder). Often brushed under the rug, this disorder is very real and affects up to 5% of women and AFAB individuals (Women’s Health) Furthermore, PMDD awareness is suicide awareness, to anyone out there with PMDD, you are not alone, and there are resources out there.

Trigger warnings: Strong language, mentions of self harm, reference to suicide.

items.text:
YORK BASED DANCERS AND EXTRAS WANTED! - THIS SUNDAY

We are currently searching for an ensemble for our final year student short film, Murder in C Minor. 

Murder in C Minor is a musical journey that fuses the spectacle of Hollywood’s Golden Age with the suspense of a noir thriller. Featuring three original songs, Murder in C Minor is a tale of fame, performance, and deception. Set in a theatre, the plot follows a hitman with a mission to assassinate the prima donna of the opera.

We are currently searching for dancers to film this Sunday (8th of March - 9:00 - 15:30) 

The dance will be to an original song, and we have a choreographer to help bring the piece to life! The number we are filming on Sunday is a movement, a diegetic piece that will be the grand finale for our film.

If you are interested, please fill out this form: https://forms.gle/JrqevzUp1pCoooVQ8

We are also looking for extras for a scene later in the day, 15:30 - 18:00! This doesn't require any dancing ability. Please register your interest in the form!

(This role is unpaid, but we can compensate for public travel (buses) with a receipt and we will be providing catering on set)

topComments.text:
Varvančios žinios (6)

Kad KGB tebeveikia, todėl reikia KGB agentų pavardes išviešinti
LRT TV 2025 m. gegužės 24 d. rodė – aiškiai neskaidrų – dainų atrankos konkursą „Dainuoju Lietuvą“. Atrodo, kad pačią pirmutinę vietą būtų užėmusi vulgariausia daina „Aš nupirksiu tau namą“ su vulgariais žodžiais apie nupirktą šunį. Bet konkursas vyko evoliuciškai, buvo rodomas kelias dienas, todėl konkurso eigoje, pradėjau mintyse planuoti parašyti viešą protestą tokiam kėgėbistiniam neskaidrumui, tad, galbūt, tik dėl to pirmos vietos tas kolektyvas negavo – mat KGB parazitų gaujelė (šiukšlės) seka minčių skaitytuvu mano mintis, galvojimą ir pagal tai perduoda kėgėbijai ką daryti toliau.
Dainos atlikėjas Tomas Krivickas iš Ukmergės sakė, kad šios dainos tekstą sukūręs per tris minutes, tualete sėdėdamas, bet nemanau, kad tai tiesa. Labiau panašu, kad koks pedas tą tekstą parašė, kaip ir dainoms „Saldainiuk, pasaulis mano saujoj, geidžiu tavęs iš naujo“, „Tu geriausias variantas, ne žmogus, o brilijantas“, arba „Krapštau nosį tušinuku“... Beje, kartą per radiją girdėjau, kad kažkas mano knygeliūkštę „Vasarvidžio laisvė“ tualete tupėdamas visą perskaitė. Tik, tiesa, nei pavadinimo, nei autorystės nepaminėdamas.
Mano mintis KGB jau tada sekė, kai suskambo „Anties“ daina “„Alio, alio – Taločka Jonas klauso, aš tavo balsą per silpnai girdžiu“.
Šventas šios muzikantų grupės pavadinimas „Requem“, išeitų, patvirtina, kad KGB tebežudo, nes lotyniškas žodis „Requem“ reiškia mišias už mirusius.
Visur yra KGB smarvė įsiskverbusi – šešėlinis veikimas, neskaidrumas.
******Neleidžia rašyti KGB šešiapirščiai – jungia dirbtinį „smegenų rūką“ ir galvos svaiginimą nuotoliniu būdu. 2026.II.26, priešpietė
Dirbtinį sąmonės Dirbtinį sąmonės „apspanginimą“ įjunginėja, kuris yra kartu dar ir skaudamas, labai nemalonus. Lyg parų paras nebūčiau normalaus miego miegojęs – tokia būna to dirbtinio kankinimo pajauta.

Jei būčiau žydas; arba rusas – ar kankintų mane biorezonatoriumi?
Išvarė enkavėdistai mane iš knygų mugės (2026.II.28). Kankinimu per atstumą, net per Žemės stebėjimo palydovą. Kasmet mugėje buvoju, kasmet ir kankina nuotoliniu būdu (biorezonatoriumi), bet šiemet kankino žiauriau, negu bet kuriais metais anksčiau: laikė įjungę dirbtinį skausmą visame kūną – skaudamą fizinių jėgų atėmimą su normalaus laikymosi ant žemės paviršiaus destabilizacija. Net kojos linko ir į šonus mėtė, todėl net už stulpo užkliuvau vaikščiodamas tarp prekystalių – atsiprašau, vaikščiodamas it šmėkla Sokrato, kuris eidamas per prekyvietę kartojo: „Kiek čia daug daiktų, kurie man nereikalingi“. Todėl nė vyno neišgėręs, ir 16 eurų už bilietą sumokęs, turėjau, neatlaikęs, anksti pasukti iš mugės – namolekos. O planavau kone visą šviesią dieną mugėje išbūti tarp knygų ir tarp gražių žmonių, kur Arvydas Juozaitis, Libertas Klimka; ponas japonas Kleiva; Mozė Mitkevičius, Giedrė Kazkauskaitė autografus rašo... Sutikau mugėje, jei neapsipažinau, Egidijų Sipavičių, Deivydą Zvonkų; Kęstutį Urbą; ekspremjerę Šimonytę; konstitucionalistą Vytautą Sinkevičių – šiam pasiūliau savo nemokamą „laikraštį“ „Kas čia parašyta yra tiesa“, bet neėmė, tad žodžiu pasakiau, kad KGB kūno skausmais kankina mane nuotoliniu būdu ir seka minčių skaitytuvu mano mintis (bet manau, jis apie manęs kankinimą žino jau seniai, nes kai kalbėdavo per radiją, tai iš jo kalbų suprasdavau, kad žino).
„Šešėlinė sistema“ (kaip konkrečiau dabar tebeveikiantys KGB vadinasi?) rodė mugėje ir mano pažįstamųjų „dublerius“. Šįkart, be kitų, skaniai valgantį poetą Joną Endrijaitį iš Lazdijų; neatsitiktinai sutikau panašųjį į Povilą Bobiną iš Jungėnų kaimo (po mano mamos nužudymo, kėgėbistų liepimu, mane atakuojantį) bei jo žmoną Roretą... Jau labai daug metų KGB rodo man panašius žmones į mano pažįstamuosius, ar tik žmones plačiai žinomus.). Pasisveikinau su bardu Landsbergiu (negalima rašyti „su Vytautu Landsbergiu“, nes nebus aišku su kuriuo; tad štai kaip nereikia savo vaikų krikštyti tėvo vardu! Net nei prosenelio vardu, nes antai, Gabrieliui Landsbergiui lenta kabo ant namo, kuriame jis gyveno, ir jo nepotis Gabrielius gal to nei nežino...).
Namie dar smarkiau pradėjo šiais skausmais kankinti, kai parėjau ir atsiguliau – kerštaudami, kad iš namų buvau išėjęs, kad mugėje buvau; tai irgi kasdieninis reikalas: kankinimo atskaitymas už tai, kad režimo nesilaikau (bet juk, pvz., į mane panašusis Masiulis, sėdėdamas kalėjime laisvai po Kauną vaikšto, tad koks čia paritetas ir lygiava! Juokais sakant). Šįkart, be minėto skausmo, dar ir galvaskausmį gulinčiam buvo įjungę – skausmą, lyg duriantis baslys, galvoje įkaltas.
Tegul egzekutoriai paaiškina, t. y. pasiaiškina (teisėjui arba teisėjai) už ką jie mane, pavyzdžiui, šįkart, kankino. Juk gal ne už tai, kad vaikštinėjau mugėje su skrybėle kaip žydas (žydas būčiau, tai, aišku, jie manęs nekankintų; arba jei būčiau rusas).
Šį nusikaltimą kondensuotai esu aprašęs savo skrajutėje „Kas čia parašyta yra tiesa“. Dalinu ją. Net ir svieto lygintojui Lyriui Bekmanui įteikiau, autobuse kartu su juo važiuodamas. Sakiau jam, kad niekaip niekur negaliu šio nusikaltimo paskelbti dėl to, kad KGB yra viską perėmę, tebeveikia, ir jis patvirtino šį teiginį.

Mugėje, kaip ir kasdien, lojo žodžius jie man taip pat ir savojo vadeivos Juozo Glinskio balsu; Balsą J. Glinskis manęs pjovimui yra pats sintezavęs ir palikęs KGB irštvos egzekutoriams kad laidytų į mane, bet kur esantį. O gal jis pats buvo irštvoje, gyvai lojo į mane? Nesistengiu atskirti, nelabai tai yra ir lengva (kada egzekutoriai jo balsu loja, o kada jis gyvai pats visokius trivialius žodžius į mane laido).
Kai jie man loja naudodami J. Glinskio balsą, tai galima laikyti, kad loja jis pats gyvai, nes jis tyčia, specialiai savo balsą KGB irštvoje yra įrašęs žodžių kalbėjimo man reikalui, nusikalstamam per infragarsą kalbėjimui (tų gaujelės žodžių, kuriuos aš girdžiu, šalia manęs niekas negirdi).
Kur yra jų irštva, koks adresas? 

Vadovaujami žydo Juozo Glinskio KGB skeltanagiai nuo 1993 metų kankina mane dirbtiniais skausmais kūne ir seka minčių skaitytuvu mano mintis, mano galvos funkcionavimą, naudodamiesi slaptuoju spinduliniu, akustiniu bei elektromagnetiniu Rusijos ginklu. Šiuo ginklu naudodamiesi, tie išsigimėliai kasdien blokuoja mano atminties epizodus, kasdien naikina trina smegenyse procedūrinės atminties neuronus. Tai toks barbariškas nusikaltimas vyksta! Areštuokite juos ir nuteiskite.

Tie iššaudytini KGB kraugeriai Rusijos pakalikai skeltanagiai sorošininkai žiurkės echidnos (kurie slaptuoju spinduliniu Rusijos ginklu kankina mane ir seka minčių skaitytuvu mano galvos funkcionavimą) nužudė (2025 m. rugsėjo 18 d., ryte) nuotoliniu būdu mano seserį Birutę, spinduliais veikdami ją; ne tik mano mamą nužudė (2023.VII.7). Kur yra jų irštva, koks adresas?

Pasaulis mato, kas ant žurnalistų mikrofonų užrašyta, kai jie interviu ima. Mūsų nacionalinės televizijos mikrofonai turėtų būti su užrašu „Lietuva“, o ne kažkoks ten neaiškus užrašas „LRT“ (kaip „KGB“).

Buvusi mano žmona 2026 m. vasario 23 d. man pasakė, kad... buto raktus ji atidavė „kitam žmogui“! Aš su šia KGB provokacija jokiu būdu nesutinku. Mes su ja oficialiai išsiskyrę gyvename tame pačiame bute. Beje, ir ją KGB parazitai jau labai daug metų visaip pakankina nuotoliniu būdu, bet ji tuo netiki ir į polikliniką dėl to vaikšto.

Ar prita
Negausinkime imigrantų.

Jonas Baranauskas, t. +37061399523

Hey Leute für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy/Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller männlich und weiblich für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Ritter und Räuber. Voraussichtlicher Sart der Endschlachtszenen, April 2026, gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald. Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, gerne auch ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme  

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

Werde auch DU Teil von Backstage Event Management – Gemeinsam wachsen. Gemeinsam erfolgreich sein.

Du bist Künstlerin oder Künstler mit Vision, Talent und dem Wunsch nach mehr?
Dann ist jetzt der richtige Moment, den nächsten Schritt zu gehen.

Backstage Event Management steht für professionelle Betreuung, starke Netzwerke und echte Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Ich begleite dich nicht nur – ich baue mit dir deine Marke auf, strategisch, nachhaltig und individuell.

🎤 Künstlervermittlung & Booking
📈 Karriereplanung & strategischer Aufbau
📣 Marketing & Social Media Support
🤝 Zugang zu exklusiven Events & starken Partnern

Ich glaube an Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe. An Kreativität mit Struktur. Und an Erfolg, der gemeinsam entsteht.

Egal ob Newcomer oder etablierter Künstlerin – wenn du bereit bist, dein Potenzial voll auszuschöpfen, dann freue ich mich darauf, dich kennenzulernen.

Backstage Event Management – Deine Bühne. Dein Moment. Unser gemeinsamer Weg.

Jetzt bewerben und Teil meines Netzwerks werden.

#kuenstlervermittlung #backstageeventkerzenheim

🤝 Zugang zu exklusiven Events & starken Partnern

Ich glaube an Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe. An Kreativität mit Struktur. Und an Erfolg, der gemeinsam entsteht.

Egal ob Newcomer oder etablierter Künstlerin – wenn du bereit bist, dein Potenzial voll auszuschöpfen, dann freue ich mich darauf, dich kennenzulernen.

Backstage Event Management – Deine Bühne. Dein Moment. Unser gemeinsamer Weg.

Jetzt bewerben und Teil meines Netzwerks werden.

#kuenstlervermittlung #backstageeventkerzenheim
items.title: Werde auch DU Teil von Backstage Event Management – Gemeinsam wachsen. Gemeinsam erfolgreich sein.

items.text:
En plante, der ødelægger kræftceller på bare 48 timer! Den er 100 gange mere effektiv end kemoterapi.
Burrerod (Arctium lappa) har været brugt i århundreder i traditionel medicin, især i asiatisk og europæisk urtemedicin. Den er kendt for sine kraftfulde afgiftende egenskaber og er blevet anerkendt for sin potentielle rolle i kræftbehandling.
Fuld opskrift

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 10/2026

LEBENSECHTE ROBOTERTIERE UND DER INTERNATIONALE FRAUENTAG

Der neueste Pixar Streifen lässt menschliches Bewusstsein in tierische Roboterwesen einpflanzen. In wie weit der neueste Animationsfilm ein Hit werden könnte, verrät Ihnen Sarah Fuchs.

Christian Bale reist als Frankenstein in die 1930er Jahre, um eine Frau zu finden. THE BRIDE entpuppt sich allerdings als Fehlexperiment, die tödliche Spuren hinterlässt.

Zum Frauentag 2026 starten zwei ganz besondere Filme inkl. Interviews mit Adrian Goiginger sowie Axel Stasny (VIER MINUS DREI, EIN LEBEN IN FARBE).

Musikalisch erinnern wir an die kürzlich verstorbene Hollywood Legende Robert Duvall.

Mittwoch 4.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Fotocredit Robert Duvall: David Shankbone

items.title: Casting Call!

items.text:
Casting call for the Indie Short HOTLINE 

TITLE: HOTLINE 

GENRE: Dark Comedy, Absurd 

LOGLINE: When a chaotic former phone sex operator and her too self-controlled coworker hide from an active shooter at their New Year’s Eve office party in a suicide hotline center, they must find a way to stay alive while helping callers do the same. 

ROLES: Need two actresses for both drama and comedy in a B&W short like ROMY & MICHELLE meets WAITING FOR GODOT in a tone similar to KINDS OF KINDNESS or VIRGIN SUICIDES.

SERENA: (Female, 40s, heart of a CEO but stuck in admin, Ali Wong type) Serena’s decisive, competent and moral but maybe a little repressed. Rapid fire dialogue with a light touch, screwball physical comedy, flashes of panic amid bold leadership. 

ROXANE: (Female, 30s, former phone sex operator, Merritt Wever, Jennifer Coolidge type) Roxane might seem naive and dress like a showgirl but she's also wise, sincere empathetic and earthy. Believably gullible, clueless, light touch, comedic timing.

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Very Normal Productions, LLC. Female director Chelsey Schmidt. Cinefemme is a fiscal sponsor. 

PRODUCTION TYPE: Indie, Student Film

TONE: Dark, absurdist, quirky, offbeat, playful, ironic, screwball, claustrophobic,

 

COMPENSATION: $400 stipend for two shooting days, one zoom table read and two half-day rehearsals tbd. Meals and snacks. Transportation set upon request.

RUN TIME: 15 minutes 

UNION: Non-union

SUBMISSIONS: Please send to verynormalprod@gmail.com by March 8, 2026. [Extended from March 1] We can't respond to all applicants, but will be contacting those selected with next steps. 

• Name and contact info

• Headshot or recent photo

• Resume

items.summary:
Casting call for the Indie Short HOTLINE 

TITLE: HOTLINE 

GENRE: Dark Comedy, Absurd 

LOGLINE: When a chaotic former phone sex operator and her too self-controlled coworker hide from an active shooter at their New Year’s Eve office party in a suicide hotline center, they must find a way to stay alive while helping callers do the same. 

ROLES: Need two actresses for both drama and comedy in a B&W short like ROMY & MICHELLE meets WAITING FOR GODOT in a tone similar to KINDS OF KINDNESS or VIRGIN SUICIDES.

SERENA: (Female, 40s, heart of a CEO but stuck in admin, Ali Wong type) Serena’s decisive, competent and moral but maybe a little repressed. Rapid fire dialogue with a light touch, screwball physical comedy, flashes of panic amid bold leadership. 

ROXANE: (Female, 30s, former phone sex operator, Merritt Wever, Jennifer Coolidge type) Roxane might seem naive and dress like a showgirl but she's also wise, sincere empathetic and earthy. Believably gullible, clueless, light touch, comedic timing.

PRODUCTION COMPANY: Very Normal Productions, LLC. Female director Chelsey Schmidt. Cinefemme is a fiscal sponsor. 

PRODUCTION TYPE: Indie, Student Film

TONE: Dark, absurdist, quirky, offbeat, playful, ironic, screwball, claustrophobic,

 

COMPENSATION: $400 stipend for two shooting days, one zoom table read and two half-day rehearsals tbd. Meals and snacks. Transportation set upon request.

RUN TIME: 15 minutes 

UNION: Non-union

SUBMISSIONS: Please send to verynormalprod@gmail.com by March 8, 2026. [Extended from March 1] We can't respond to all applicants, but will be contacting those selected with next steps. 

• Name and contact info

• Headshot or recent photo

• Resume 

• Reel or self tape dark comedy scene/monologue

• Subject line: HOTLINE CASTING - [your name and role]

• Availability weekends in May and June if unavailable May 16, 17

FILMING LOCATION: Denver/Boulder area, all locations indoors

TW: suicide and active shooter, sexual situations (dialogue only)

Thank you!
